omega.title: UNIVERSE OMEGA 3 - Research-Backed Formula
omega.tagline: There's good Omega-3 — and then there's truly the best.
omega.description: Premium Omega-3 from MEG-3® raw material in triglyceride form, sourced by DSM/KD Nutra (Switzerland/USA). Supports brain, cardiovascular, skin, and immune health.
narrative_paragraphs: There are good fats, and there are great fats. When it comes to your brain, heart, and the health of children, only premium-quality Omega-3 delivers tangible results — and safety.

Fatty acids form the foundation of cell membranes and fuel muscles, including the heart, brain, and other vital organs. Universe Vitamins™ Omega-3 is sourced from small fish caught in the ecologically pristine waters of Iceland — every bottle traceable, every drop pure MEG-3 fish oil in its highly absorbable triglyceride form.
Produced under sustainability principles, free of heavy metals, and lightly flavored with a natural fish note. Formulated for the entire family — from children to active adults to seniors.

why_works.title: Premium Sourcing
why_works.footnote: Why not large fish? Predatory fish accumulate mercury. Small fish = cleaner Omega-3.

why_works.title: Clinical Potency
why_works.footnote: Exceeds label claim by 24% - independently verified by RAN laboratory.

why_works.title: Safety Certified
bullets: No GMO, gluten, preservatives, titanium dioxide
why_works.footnote: International certifications: FDA, GMP, ISO, TÜRKAK, Halal, IAS.

supplement_facts.other_ingredients: Softgel Capsule (gelatin, glycerin, purified water), Natural Tocopherols (antioxidant).
supplement_facts.caution: Consult physician if pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or have a medical condition. Keep out of reach of children.
supplement_facts.caution_extra: Natural color variation may occur. Store in cool, dry place after opening.

health_benefits.title: Cardiovascular Health
bullets: Danish study: 90% lower heart disease risk
EPA reduces inflammation in blood vessels

health_benefits.title: Vision Protection
bullets: Protects against macular degeneration (1 in 3 over 65)

usage.time: Take once per day with food to enhance absorption. Can be taken with breakfast, lunch, or dinner.
usage.course: Minimum 1 month for initial benefits. Continuous supplementation recommended for optimal results. Course can be repeated as needed.
usage.note: Omega-3 benefits are cumulative. Consistent daily use over 2-3 months provides maximum cardiovascular, cognitive, and anti-inflammatory effects.

bullets: Store in a cool, dry place away from children
Keep in dark glass bottle (protects from oxidation)
Consult doctor if pregnant, nursing, or taking medication
Not recommended for children under 3 without medical supervision
If you have a medical condition, consult physician before use
Keep out of reach of children

dimensions.caption: Compact bottle design for easy storage

manufacturing.note: Manufactured under GMP, ISO, and FDA standards

whats_inside.desc: Eicosapentaenoic acid — the anti-inflammatory Omega-3. Supports cardiovascular health, healthy mood, and the body's inflammation response.

whats_inside.desc: Docosahexaenoic acid — makes up ~60% of the brain's structural fat. Supports cognitive function, vision, and nervous system development.

whats_inside.desc: Premium raw material from KD Nutra/DSM (Switzerland/USA). Triglyceride form delivers superior absorption vs. ethyl ester forms common in cheaper supplements.

vegan-omega3.title: Vegan Omega-3 MAGomega® - Bioavailable Plant-Based DHA
vegan-omega3.tagline: Vegan Omega-3 with the highest bioavailability — safe for kids and pregnancy.
vegan-omega3.description: High-concentration Omega-3 from MAGomega® monoglyceride (Solutex, Spain) with DHA dominance. Officially approved for children and pregnant women.
key_benefits: Safe for children from age 0 and pregnant women
narrative_paragraphs: This isn't just Omega-3 — it's a high-concentration formula based on premium MAGomega® raw material (Solutex, Spain), with emphasis on DHA — the key fatty acid for the brain, vision, and nervous system. Ideal for children, pregnant women, and adults.
When it comes to cognitive function, brain development, and nervous system support, what matters isn't just the amount of Omega-3 — but the form, the purity, and the DHA-to-EPA ratio.

MAGomega® from Solutex is a concentrate of Omega-3 in monoglyceride (MAG) form. Compared to standard forms, it delivers significantly higher bioavailability: 4× higher than ethyl esters, and 2× higher than triglyceride form. Maximally safe — the best alternative for pregnant women, children from age 0, and anyone choosing the best for themselves.

why_works.title: Premium Sourcing
bullets: Officially approved for kids 0+ and pregnancy
why_works.footnote: Highest-bioavailability vegan Omega-3 form on the market today.

why_works.title: Clinical Potency
bullets: 4× more bioavailable than ethyl ester forms
DHA-dominant (2:1 vs EPA) for brain support
why_works.footnote: Form, not just dose — that's where bioavailability comes from.

why_works.title: Safety Certified
bullets: Officially approved for children from 0 years
why_works.footnote: International certifications: FDA, GMP, ISO, TÜRKAK, Halal, IAS.

supplement_facts.other_ingredients: MAGomega® algae-derived Omega-3 monoglyceride concentrate (Solutex, Spain), vegan capsule shell.
supplement_facts.caution: Consult physician if pregnant or nursing. Keep out of reach of children.
supplement_facts.caution_extra: Approved for use during pregnancy and from age 0 under supervision.

magnesium-5in1.title: Liposomal Magnesium 5-in-1 - 4 Forms + Active B6
magnesium-5in1.tagline: Not just magnesium — synergy that delivers real results.
magnesium-5in1.description: Liposomal magnesium complex combining 4 bioavailable forms (citrate, bisglycinate, taurate, malate) with active B6 (P-5-P) and inulin prebiotic for nervous system, energy, and relaxation.
magnesium-5in1.narrative_h2: A Smarter Way to Take Magnesium
narrative_paragraphs: Magnesium participates in more than 300 biochemical processes — including energy production, nervous system function, muscle relaxation, and maintaining heart rhythm.
When it comes to the nervous system, energy, sleep, stress resilience, and heart health, what matters isn't just dosage — it's the form of magnesium and its combination with amino acids.

Universe Vitamins™ Magnesium 5-in-1 Complex is a synergistic formula combining 4 bioavailable forms of magnesium — citrate, bisglycinate, taurate, malate — with active vitamin B6 (P-5-P) and a liposomal-active phospholipid matrix for delivery into the cell. Enhanced with inulin prebiotic for microbiome support.

narrative_paragraphs: Modern lifestyle, stress, and nutrition often lead to deficiency of key trace elements that drive immune defense, energy, and overall well-being. Zinc is part of all modern protocols for COVID-19 recovery, fertility planning, men's testosterone support, and Anti-age & Longevity programs.

Universe Vitamins™ Liposomal Zinc Complex isn't just zinc — it's a thoughtful formula where each component amplifies the others. Three bioavailable zinc forms (picolinate, bisglycinate, citrate) for maximum absorption, stable effect, and prolonged action.

Enhanced with chelated copper, selenomethionine, inulin prebiotic, and a liposomal phospholipid matrix that delivers actives directly into the cell. Not just a supplement — systemic body support at the cellular level.

vitamin-c.narrative_h2: Vitamin C That Actually Reaches Your Cells
narrative_paragraphs: Most vitamin C is only partially absorbed. The rest passes through unused, providing no benefit. When it comes to immunity, energy, and cellular protection, what matters isn't just dosage — it's the form and how it's delivered to the cell.

Universe Vitamins™ Liposomal Vitamin C is a high-efficacy formula with enhanced bioavailability via phospholipid delivery system. Each shot contains 900mg vitamin C as sodium ascorbate (gentle bioavailable form) plus citrus bioflavonoids, Quercefit® quercetin from Indena (Italy), and rosehip extract.

Liposomal technology provides more efficient cellular penetration of vitamin C, amplifying its action. Vitamin C is one of the body's key antioxidants, but its effectiveness depends entirely on form and absorption.

collagen-bovine.title: Anti-age Bovine Collagen Verisol® - Clinically Proven
collagen-bovine.name_full_html: Universe Vitamins<sup class="text-base">TM</sup> Anti-age & Longevity Bovine Collagen
collagen-bovine.tagline: Verisol® collagen — clinically proven results in 8 weeks.
collagen-bovine.description: Patented Verisol® bovine collagen (Gelita, Germany) with anti-age cofactors. Halal certified. 30 sachets per pack. 5 flavors available.
narrative_paragraphs: When it comes to skin, joints, and slowing aging, only a comprehensive approach with clinically meaningful dosages and component synergy delivers visible results.

Collagen is the body's primary structural protein — forming skin, ligaments, joints, and connective tissues. After age 25, natural collagen synthesis declines, leading to loss of skin elasticity and joint deterioration.

Universe Vitamins™ Anti-age & Longevity Bovine Collagen is a comprehensive formula featuring premium patented German Verisol® collagen, collagen synthesis cofactors, and Anti-age components for comprehensive recovery and body support.

why_works.title: Premium Sourcing
why_works.footnote: Verisol® is the most clinically studied collagen peptide on the market.

usage.time: Take once daily — preferably in the morning on an empty stomach or 1-2 hours after a meal for better amino acid absorption.
usage.course: Recommended course — 3 months for visible clinical results.
usage.note: Do not mix with hot water — preserves peptide structure. Clinical results manifest from 8 weeks of consistent use.

bone-longevity.title: Bone Longevity Complex - PHOSCALIM® Marine Hydroxyapatite
bone-longevity.tagline: Marine hydroxyapatite — calcium your bones actually use.
bone-longevity.description: PHOSCALIM® marine hydroxyapatite (Copalis, France) — natural calcium, phosphorus, and type-1 collagen complex. Plus silicon, vitamin D3 and K2 for full bone support.
bone-longevity.narrative_h2: Bone Tissue Is Living — Feed It Right
narrative_paragraphs: Bone tissue is a dynamic structure that constantly renews itself. After age 30-35, breakdown processes begin to outpace recovery — leading to reduced bone density, higher injury risk, and decreased joint mobility.

Universe Vitamins™ Bone Longevity is a premium next-generation formula featuring PHOSCALIM® — a marine hydroxyapatite that's a natural complex of calcium, phosphorus, and type-1 collagen, identical to the mineral structure of bone tissue.
Enhanced with silicon, vitamin D3, vitamin K2, and additional cofactors for proper calcium distribution — directing minerals to bones and away from arteries.

When it comes to gut health, immunity, overall well-being, and longevity — what matters isn't merely the presence of probiotics, but their dosage, strain diversity, and the ability to reach the gut in active form.

The microbiome is a key body system influencing digestion, immunity, metabolism, and even cognitive function. Microflora imbalance can lead to weakened immunity, GI problems, and chronic inflammation.

iroton-liposomal.description: Iron bisglycinate with vitamin C, active B-vitamins (Quatrefolic® B9, P-5-P, R-5-P), L-lysine, and liposomal phospholipid matrix for maximum absorption.
narrative_paragraphs: This isn't just iron — it's a thoughtful absorption system that actually works. When it comes to restoring iron levels, energy, and oxygen exchange, what matters isn't just dosage — it's the form of iron, its transport in the body, and combination with cofactors.
Iron is a key element for hemoglobin synthesis, oxygen transport, brain function, and energy production. Iron deficiency leads to chronic fatigue, reduced concentration, and weakened immunity.

Universe Vitamins™ Liposomal Iroton uses iron bisglycinate — a form that's gentle on the stomach, has high absorption rate, and doesn't cause the side effects typical of cheaper iron forms. Enhanced with vitamin C, Quatrefolic® methylfolate, active B6 and B2, and L-lysine.

Methylation is one of the body's key biochemical processes, affecting brain function, neurotransmitter synthesis, energy levels, detoxification, and cellular protection.

usage.h3: How to Take Liposomal Vitamin D3:
usage.dosage: Adults: 1-10 drops per day depending on need and deficiency level
usage.time: Best taken with food — vitamin D3 is fat-soluble.
usage.course: Recommended course — 8-12 weeks for measurable serum vitamin D level rise.
usage.note: Higher doses (5-10 drops) require medical supervision and ideally serum 25-OH vitamin D testing.

bullets: Store in a cool, dry place away from children
Consult doctor if pregnant, nursing, or taking medication
If you have hypercalcemia, do NOT use without MD
Keep out of reach of children
caution.note: This product is a dietary supplement, not a medicine. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

dimensions.caption: See product label for exact dimensions

manufacturing.note: Manufactured under GMP, ISO, and FDA standards

vitamin-d3.whats_inside_intro: Quali-D® vitamin D3 from DSM (Switzerland) in MCT oil from STELLIESTERS® (France) — premium European raw materials in liposomal delivery.

whats_inside.title: Vitamin D3 (Quali-D®)
whats_inside.desc: Cholecalciferol form — the natural vitamin D produced by skin in sunlight. From DSM (Switzerland), the global pharmaceutical standard.

whats_inside.title: STELLIESTERS® MCT Oil
whats_inside.desc: Premium medium-chain triglyceride oil from France. Enhances fat-soluble vitamin uptake.

whats_inside.title: Liposomal Technology
whats_inside.desc: Phospholipid matrix delivers vitamin D3 directly into the cell, bypassing absorption limits of standard oral vitamin D.

whats_inside.title: Smart Drops Format
whats_inside.desc: Precise dose titration with pipette. Suitable for all ages — adjust drops based on individual need.

shop_more.title: Immune Health
shop_more.desc: Vitamin D3+K2, Vitamin C, Zinc Complex

vitamin-d3-k2.title: Liposomal Vitamin D3+K2 Smart Drops - Synergistic Calcium Routing
vitamin-d3-k2.name_full_html: Universe Vitamins<sup class="text-base">TM</sup> Liposomal Vitamin D3+K2 Smart Drops
vitamin-d3-k2.tagline: D3 absorbs calcium. K2 directs it to bones. Together they're complete.
vitamin-d3-k2.description: Liposomal vitamin D3 (Quali-D® DSM) with vitamin K2 MK-7 (K2VITAL® Kappa Bioscience, Norway) in MCT oil. Synergistic immune, bone, and cardiovascular support.
narrative_paragraphs: Universe Vitamins™ Liposomal Vitamin D3+K2 is a premium formula for immune, bone, and cardiovascular support — with maximum bioavailability.
Vitamin D3 (Quali-D®) promotes calcium absorption from the gut and supports immunity. Vitamin K2 (K2VITAL® MK-7) directs that calcium specifically to bones — and prevents arterial deposition.
Together they work significantly more effectively than separately. Calcium without K2 risks cardiovascular calcification — that's why this synergy matters.

why_works.title: Premium Sourcing
why_works.footnote: Three patented European premium ingredients in one formula.

why_works.title: Clinical Potency
why_works.footnote: MK-7 form lasts 24h in body — vs MK-4 only 1-2h. Worth the premium.

why_works.title: Safety Certified
bullets: Manufactured under GMP, ISO, FDA standards
why_works.footnote: International certifications: FDA, GMP, ISO, TÜRKAK, Halal, IAS.

supplement_facts.other_ingredients: STELLIESTERS® MCT oil (France), liposomal phospholipid matrix.
supplement_facts.caution: Consult physician if pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or have a medical condition. Keep out of reach of children.
supplement_facts.caution_extra: If on blood thinners (warfarin, etc.), consult physician before use — K2 affects coagulation.

usage.time: Best taken with food — both vitamins are fat-soluble.
usage.course: Recommended course — 8-12 weeks for measurable serum vitamin D rise.
usage.note: If on blood thinners, consult physician before use — K2 affects coagulation.

Consult doctor if pregnant, nursing, or taking medication

longevity-complex.title: Anti-age & Longevity Complex - NMN, PQQ, CoQ10 Ubiqsome®
longevity-complex.name_full_html: Universe Vitamins<sup class="text-base">TM</sup> Anti-age & Longevity Complex
longevity-complex.tagline: Aging is a multi-system process. So is the solution.
longevity-complex.description: Multi-tier anti-age system: NMN + TMG for NAD⁺, CoQ10 Ubiqsome® + PQQ for mitochondria, Quercefit® and oleuropein for inflammation, sulforaphane and spermidine for autophagy.
narrative_paragraphs: Aging isn't just time. It's a gradual decline in NAD⁺ levels, deterioration of mitochondrial function, and accumulation of cellular damage.
Universe Vitamins™ Longevity Complex isn't just a supplement. It's a multi-tier youth-extension system, designed to work at the deep cellular level, drawing on the latest scientific data about aging.
Five pathways addressed: NAD⁺ restoration, mitochondrial function, inflammation control, detox/autophagy activation, and cognitive support — all in one formula.

why_works.title: Premium Sourcing
why_works.footnote: Premium patented ingredients across the entire longevity stack.

why_works.title: Clinical Potency
bullets: Quercefit® 7× more bioavailable than ordinary quercetin
why_works.footnote: Multi-pathway approach — each system reinforces the others.

why_works.title: Safety Certified
bullets: Manufactured under GMP, ISO, FDA standards
why_works.footnote: International certifications: FDA, GMP, ISO, TÜRKAK, Halal, IAS.

supplement_facts.caution: Consult physician if pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or have a medical condition. Keep out of reach of children.
supplement_facts.caution_extra: Designed for adults 25+ engaged in active longevity protocols.

usage.h3: How to Take Anti-age & Longevity Complex:
usage.time: Take in the morning or with first meal — formula is energizing.
usage.course: Recommended use: monthly cycles (30-day course), can be repeated.
usage.note: Designed for adults 25+ engaged in active longevity protocols. Best paired with healthy lifestyle (sleep, exercise, balanced nutrition).

bullets: Store in a cool, dry place away from children
Single-serving sachets — open just before use
Consult doctor if pregnant, nursing, or taking medication
Not intended for children or adolescents
If on blood thinners or with cardiac issues, consult physician (CoQ10, K-related interactions)
Keep out of reach of children

longevity-complex.whats_inside_intro: Twelve premium ingredients across five longevity pathways — NAD⁺, mitochondria, inflammation, autophagy, cognition.

whats_inside.title: NAD⁺ Stack (NMN + TMG)
whats_inside.desc: NMN is the direct precursor of NAD⁺ — the molecule that powers cellular energy and DNA repair. TMG stabilizes the methylation cycle.

whats_inside.title: Mitochondrial Stack
whats_inside.desc: CoQ10 Ubiqsome® for mito energy. PQQ stimulates new mitochondria formation. Astaxanthin protects membranes from oxidative damage.

whats_inside.title: Inflammation + Autophagy
whats_inside.desc: Quercefit®, oleuropein, hydroxytyrosol fight inflammation. Sulforaphane (Nrf2), R-ALA, and spermidine activate detox and autophagy.

whats_inside.title: Cognitive Stack
whats_inside.desc: Magnesium L-threonate is the only Mg form that crosses the blood-brain barrier. Improves memory, concentration, and neuroplasticity.
